title: cycnium brachycalyx
intro: Cycnium brachycalyx, also known as the "wolf's bane of the Holy Land," is a perennial plant native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its alkaloid compounds, which have been used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Cycnium brachycalyx include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce pain and promote wound healing. Cycnium brachycalyx can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in traditional medicine in the Middle East and North Africa.
